Hey guys, welcome to the walkthrough for the sacred cows and the belief restructuring. So the workbook for this module has three examples in there, I believe, but the one I really want to break down here is actually the live version of list builders lab to point out. And the reason I want to show you this here is because I think the designer did a really awesome job in laying this out. So this might be something that inspires you in your own design when it comes to laying out your sacred cows and their corresponding belief restructuring. So let's go through it. So the five reasons you're still stuck with the chronic case of list envy and how to snap out of it right now. So right off the bat, the headline is very diagnostic of the moment of highest tension list envy. That is the result of that question of how many people on your list and knowing that you don't have as many as you want and that others have more. So adding a name to it, kind of fun. Reason one, you're overwhelmed and distracted by all the tactics and strategies. And then you have a little drop down here and you can almost think of those reasons as having their own little individual moment of highest tensions where you can reflect back the corresponding moment of highest tension for each one of those reasons. That sounds kind of complicated as I say it, but as we read it here, you'll see that it's actually pretty simple in application. So reason one, you're overwhelmed and distracted by all the tactics and strategies. Let me guess, you started this whole list building thing with a fully loaded Starbucks card and a full tank of motivation, but 87 lattes and a fresh patch of gray hair later and you're still right where you started. You got lost in all the things all at once. What kind of lead magnets should I create? What kind of pop-ups should I install on my blog? And where do I put them? How do I connect it to my drip or mail trim account and what happens next? Should I send a welcome email, a full nurture sequence? How many emails? What about pivoting to my product or sales funnels? What about running Facebook ads, guest posting challenges, Instagram stories, Snapchat, content upgrades? As I said, all the things and they all have their place. And it's in knowing the right sequence. These strategies must be executed upon and how it's tackled and how to tackle them with complete confidence that allows you to grow your list every single day. So even in this last sentence here, we're starting to move towards the belief reframe and here we solidify it. What you need confidence to double down on a super clear first do this, then do that list building strategy that gives you visible momentum and unwavering motivation to keep stacking up the list building wins. Reason two, and we're not going to go through all that we'll go through one more here together. And then you can read the others if you still need a little bit of motivation and understanding on how to do this. Reason two, you're a permanent resident of tech. Hell. You didn't choose to move here. In fact, when you got started, you were fully committed to keeping it simple, putting it in quotes because that's something they keep hearing from every business coach and not falling prey to the infamous shiny object syndrome. But as you struggled to gain traction with your list building efforts, those shiny objects started looking more shiny. So you plunked down on the annual plans of every new software that came your way, page builders, email, automation software, cart software, webinar software, countdown timers, all teched up and nowhere to go. And no idea how to tie together at this intricate web of software and systems that you now have in your arsenal. So there's the whole moment of highest tension as it relates to that second sacred cow and the prescription, what you need to leverage a small but powerful stack of inexpensive list building tools and to allow yourself to be meticulously guided in their most effective implementations instead of forcing yourself to become a black belt tech ninja overnight. So we're going to stop there. But what I do want to point towards, and I'm sure you're noticing is each reason each sacred cow has their corresponding belief reframe. And when you look at the belief reframes of every sacred cow and myth that we bust here, all those new beliefs align with Amy's offer later on and what's inside her program and how her program delivers the result. So we're going to get more into that a little later on when we talk about the blue ocean bridge. But in case you're tuning into that, that is exactly what we're going towards. We're trying to build this narrow bridge of belief where the only way to get towards that outcome is with a product that satisfies all these conditions. So that's it. If you do want to dive deeper into the examples, there are a few more in the workbook. There is this full sales page image somewhere in this program, which you can download and look at in case it's no longer live. Otherwise, if you're feeling ready, I encourage you to take a stab at creating your own sacred cows and belief restructuring right away. And I'll see you in the next lesson.
